title: python-blivet bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[3.6.0-28.0.1]
- Replace all upstream bugzilla references
- [Orabug: 34721767], [Orabug: 29870386], [Orabug: 32114602]
- Load libblockdev btrfs plugin under UEK to support btrfs in installer
  [Orabug: 30792917]

[3.6.0-28]
- Add a pre-wipe fixup function for LVM logical volumes
  Resolves: RHEL-68368

[3.6.0-27]
- Wipe end partition before creating it as well as the start
  Resolves: RHEL-76917

[3.6.0-26]
- Make ActionDestroyFormat optional when the device is also scheduled to be removed
  Resolves: RHEL-8008
  Resolves: RHEL-8012

[3.6.0-25]
- Get the actual PV format size for LVMPV format
  Resolves: RHEL-74078
- Include additional information in PartitioningError
  Resolves: RHEL-8005

[3.6.0-24]
- Do not remove PVs from devices file if disabled or doesn't exist
  Resolves: RHEL-84662
full_text:
[3.6.0-28.0.1]
- Replace all upstream bugzilla references
- [Orabug: 34721767], [Orabug: 29870386], [Orabug: 32114602]
- Load libblockdev btrfs plugin under UEK to support btrfs in installer
  [Orabug: 30792917]

[3.6.0-28]
- Add a pre-wipe fixup function for LVM logical volumes
  Resolves: RHEL-68368

[3.6.0-27]
- Wipe end partition before creating it as well as the start
  Resolves: RHEL-76917

[3.6.0-26]
- Make ActionDestroyFormat optional when the device is also scheduled to be removed
  Resolves: RHEL-8008
  Resolves: RHEL-8012

[3.6.0-25]
- Get the actual PV format size for LVMPV format
  Resolves: RHEL-74078
- Include additional information in PartitioningError
  Resolves: RHEL-8005

[3.6.0-24]
- Do not remove PVs from devices file if disabled or doesn't exist
  Resolves: RHEL-84662

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20677-0.html
